narration: Antibodies are Y-shaped proteins that tag threats for your immune system.
visual_description: Hook visual: Antibodies are Y-shaped proteins that tag threats for your immune system.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Antibodies are Y-shaped proteins that tag threats for your immune system.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Antibodies are Y-shaped proteins that tag threats for your immune system.

narration: But what exactly do they do?
visual_description: Context visual: But what exactly do they do?
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: But what exactly do they do?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: But what exactly do they do?

narration: When a virus or bacteria invades, antibodies spring into action.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When a virus or bacteria invades, antibodies spring into action.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When a virus or bacteria invades, antibodies spring into action.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When a virus or bacteria invades, antibodies spring into action.

narration: They bind to the invaders, marking them for destruction.
visual_description: Evidence visual: They bind to the invaders, marking them for destruction.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: They bind to the invaders, marking them for destruction.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: They bind to the invaders, marking them for destruction.

narration: This helps our immune cells identify and eliminate them.
visual_description: Payoff visual: This helps our immune cells identify and eliminate them.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: This helps our immune cells identify and eliminate them.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: This helps our immune cells identify and eliminate them.

narration: Think of antibodies as the 'CSI agents' of your body, uncovering and tagging threats.
